business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: Supplemental application provided for commercial lines. Prior insurance history lists Travelers Companies in 2024 with premium 688236.25, Markel Corporation in 2023 with premium 619820.26, and Zurich Insurance Group in 2022 with premium 607294.45.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history: 2024 Travelers Companies, premium 688236.25, 11 claims, cancellations: No; 2023 Markel Corporation, premium 619820.26, 3 claims, cancellations: No; 2022 Zurich Insurance Group, premium 607294.45, 6 claims, cancellations: Yes.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Written contracts with all subcontractors: Yes. 24-hour doorperson or security on premises: Yes. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors: Yes. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring: Yes. Material Safety Data Sheets maintained: Yes. Quality control / quality assurance program: No. OSHA citations in the past 3 years: Yes. Cyber liability protections in place: No.

concerns: Short-term rentals of less than 1 year are permitted.
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities are present.
HVAC was replaced in 2026, but plumbing and electrical systems are original from 2005.
EV charging stations are installed on the premises.
Building is not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R.
No quality control / quality assurance program.
OSHA citations reported in the past 3 years.
No cyber liability protections in place.
Prior insurance history shows 20 claims over 2022-2024 and a cancellation in 2022.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history reports 11 claims in 2024 with Travelers Companies, 3 claims in 2023 with Markel Corporation, and 6 claims in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group. Cancellation was reported for 2022 only.
positives: 16 years in business and 16 years with current management.
Written contracts are in place with all subcontractors, including indemnification requirements for contractors.
90% of units are regularly occupied versus vacant.
All listed premises show sprinklered: Yes in the premises schedule.
Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring.
Material Safety Data Sheets are maintained.
